name: Trio Petroleum Corp
summary: . Overview We are a California-based oil and gas exploration and development company headquartered in Malibu, California, with our principal executive offices located at 23823 Malibu Road, Suite 304, Malibu, California 90265, with operations in Monterey County, California, Uintah County, Utah and Lloydminster, Saskatchewan.
